reviews.review_text: Group of 15 and we had amazing service. We did make reservations. Avery was our server (she was amazing) and Jessie was manager (Very personable) and rolled his sleeves up to accommodate our group!. The restaurant was packed and the entire team of employees were working their butts off. We understand that with a party that big food takes time. Never been there before but highly recommend this place!
Jesse was an amazing server! Very kind, attentive, and just wonderful service overall. Very nice man.
Jesse was an amazing server, made sure our drinks were refilled when needed, just amazing costumer service and made sure we were satisfied

Group of 15 and we had amazing service. We did make reservations. Avery was our server (she was amazing) and Jessie was manager (Very personable) and rolled his sleeves up to accommodate our group!. The restaurant was packed and the entire team of employees were working their butts off. We understand that with a party that big food takes time. Never been there before but highly recommend this place!
Jesse was an amazing server! Very kind, attentive, and just wonderful service overall. Very nice man.
Jesse was an amazing server, made sure our drinks were refilled when needed, just amazing costumer service and made sure we were satisfied
Jesse was an amazing server! Very kind, attentive, and just wonderful service overall. Very nice man.
Jesse was an amazing server, made sure our drinks were refilled when needed, just amazing costumer service and made sure we were satisfied

First time at Los Tres Amigos and I will say that I have found my new favorite Mexican restaurant in the local area. Jesse was our server and owner of the establishment and he was very welcoming. He answered all our questions and took time to get to know us on a little bit of a personal level. Great place to stop if you are ever in the area.
Amazing service with a great friendly manager over all 10/10

Excellent food and service!  Been to many Mexican restaurants and in fact several other Los Tres Amigos.   This one way more than met our expectations.  Everything was delicious and Jesse served us and he was so friendly and amazing!

We had the best server last night! There is a group of us girls that come to this restaurant once a month for what we call Margarita night. Our server last night was energetic and told us what we ordered in his most authentic Spanish which sounded great to us. LOL. He was prompt and very friendly, when we asked him his name he said it was "Fluffy" and we all kind of giggled LOL.😁
Excellent service and great food.

(Translated by Google) The food was excellent and the service was great 😋🤤

(Original)
Excelente la comida y muy buena atención 😋🤤

Excellent food and service!  Been to many Mexican restaurants and in fact several other Los Tres Amigos.   This one way more than met our expectations.  Everything was delicious and Jesse served us and he was so friendly and amazing!
Fluffy was the best server I’ve had here. Always on top of his game!😎

We had Fluffy as our server last night and he was excellent! He greeted and seated us quickly along with menus and our chips & salsa. He was fluent in his Spanish which was perfect since my friend couldn’t pronounce what she was ordering! Fluffy smiled, made eye contact and knew when to chat and when to let us eat. I hope he’s our server next time!

We had the best server last night! There is a group of us girls that come to this restaurant once a month for what we call Margarita night. Our server last night was energetic and told us what we ordered in his most authentic Spanish which sounded great to us. LOL. He was prompt and very friendly, when we asked him his name he said it was "Fluffy" and we all kind of giggled LOL.😁
Fluffy was the best server I’ve had here. Always on top of his game!😎

We had the best server last night! There is a group of us girls that come to this restaurant once a month for what we call Margarita night. Our server last night was energetic and told us what we ordered in his most authentic Spanish which sounded great to us. LOL. He was prompt and very friendly, when we asked him his name he said it was "Fluffy" and we all kind of giggled LOL.😁
Amazing food and atmosphere. Never left unhappy!! Just moved to the area and we have found our new favorite spot. Plus the mojitos are the best around!

First time at Los Tres Amigos and I will say that I have found my new favorite Mexican restaurant in the local area. Jesse was our server and owner of the establishment and he was very welcoming. He answered all our questions and took time to get to know us on a little bit of a personal level. Great place to stop if you are ever in the area.
They have a nice outdoor seating area, a good margarita and good food. I'd go back again.
Amazing food and atmosphere. Never left unhappy!! Just moved to the area and we have found our new favorite spot. Plus the mojitos are the best around!

Absolutely terrible experience at the Owosso, MI Los Tres Amigos location. Our group of 26 waited nearly 2 hours with very little service, barely any communication, and long stretches without even water refills. We were patient and understanding the entire time, but after asking if anything could be done on the bill due to the experience, the owner, Jesse, came out yelling and cursing at our group instead of trying to resolve the situation professionally.

I simply asked if he could do better than 15% off considering how poorly everything was handled, and he responded by escalating the situation and calling the police. I have never experienced an owner speak to customers that way in my life.

I understand restaurants get busy, but there is absolutely no excuse for treating customers with hostility and disrespect. Extremely disappointing experience and not somewhere I would recommend after the way we were treated.

We had the best server last night! There is a group of us girls that come to this restaurant once a month for what we call Margarita night. Our server last night was energetic and told us what we ordered in his most authentic Spanish which sounded great to us. LOL. He was prompt and very friendly, when we asked him his name he said it was "Fluffy" and we all kind of giggled LOL.😁
They have a nice outdoor seating area, a good margarita and good food. I'd go back again.

Chips were actually good, though they were slightly overdone.
Was excited to see I could order chimichangas a la cart; they are my favorite.
However it was disappointing when they arrived and the outer "crispy shell" was so well done it completely shattered 🥺 meat was meh... (Steak always) Our server was so great - so that helped with the experience.
My margarita was fantastic though. I got a watermelon on the rocks with a sugar rim. Would return for the margarita and the service, Never for the food.

We had Fluffy as our server last night and he was excellent! He greeted and seated us quickly along with menus and our chips & salsa. He was fluent in his Spanish which was perfect since my friend couldn’t pronounce what she was ordering! Fluffy smiled, made eye contact and knew when to chat and when to let us eat. I hope he’s our server next time!

We went for Taco Tuesday, 3 of us.  They cancelled 2.00 tacos on cinco demio and it cost me &75.00 plus tip.  I will not be going back there.  Not worth it.
